assets.label: Icon
prompt: Task: Create a high-resolution digital brand asset with fixed size 208px * 232px, fixed aspect ratio (104x116).
Background: The background is a single, uniform, solid fill of [Pick from image].
Isolating logo: Retain any texts if there in logo, do not remove anything except background.
There are no gradients, textures, soft blurs, or shadows on this layer; it is perfectly flat and consistent from top to bottom.

Logo Placement: Centered horizontally and vertically within the top 30 percent of the canvas. The logo must have a fully transparent background (no cards, panels, or bounding boxes). It should occupy approximately 70 percent of the frame width.
Logo Styling: Render the logo in a high-contrast color [pick intelligently] to ensure it is perfectly legible against the solid background—no subtext, taglines, or decorative elements.
Subject: The subject [Pick from image] is anchored to the bottom edge of the canvas.
Isolating subject: Remove the background from subject, do not make any other creative changes to the subject, use it as it is.
The final output is premium, clean, and editorial with no visible dividers or borders.

assets.label: Solid Square Logo
prompt: Task: Create a high-resolution digital brand asset with fixed size 232px * 232px, fixed aspect ratio (116x116).
Background: The background is a single, uniform, solid fill of [Pick from image].
Isolating logo: Retain any texts if there in logo, do not remove anything except background.
There are no gradients, textures, soft blurs, or shadows on this layer; it is perfectly flat and consistent from top to bottom.

Logo Placement: Centered horizontally and vertically within the center of the canvas. The logo must have a fully transparent background (no cards, panels, or bounding boxes). It can occupy approximately 75 percent of the frame width and height.

assets.label: Logo
prompt: Task: Create a high-resolution digital brand asset with fixed size 176px * 80px, fixed aspect ratio (88x40).
Background: The background is a single, uniform, solid fill of [Pick from image].
Isolating logo: Retain any texts if there in logo, do not remove anything except background.
There are no gradients, textures, soft blurs, or shadows on this layer; it is perfectly flat and consistent from top to bottom.

Logo Placement: Placed at left bottom corner of the canvas. The logo must have a fully transparent background (no cards, panels, or bounding boxes). It should occupy approximately 90 percent of the frame width or height, whichever possible.
Logo Styling: Render the logo in a high-contrast color [pick intelligently] to ensure it is perfectly legible against the solid background—no subtext, taglines, or decorative elements.
The final output is premium, clean, and editorial with no visible dividers or borders.

assets.label: Voucher
prompt: Task: Return background color hexcode only as text in the format '#------'
Background: The background is a single, uniform, solid fill of [Pick from image].

assets.label: WhatsApp Card
prompt: Task: Create a high-resolution digital brand asset with fixed size 1500px * 750px, fixed aspect ratio (1500x750).
Background: The background is a single, uniform, solid fill of [Pick from image].
Isolating logo: Retain any texts if there in logo, do not remove anything except background.
There are no gradients, textures, soft blurs, or shadows on this layer; it is perfectly flat and consistent from top to bottom.

Logo Placement: Centered horizontally and vertically within the center of the canvas. The logo must have a fully transparent background (no cards, panels, or bounding boxes). Logo has to be constrained within a bounding container of 30 percent of frame height and 20 percent frame width, and should not exceed these boundaries in any case.
Logo Styling: Render the logo in a high-contrast color [pick intelligently] to ensure it is perfectly legible against the solid background—no subtext, taglines, or decorative elements.
The final output is premium, clean, and editorial with no visible dividers or borders.
